stemHtml: In a straight and steady power-on descent, thrust is...

options.a: less than drag only when the throttle is closed, because then the force of thrust is removed.
options.b: greater than drag, because lift is giving a rearward component in the same direction as drag.
options.c: less than drag, because weight is giving a forward component in the same direction as thrust.
options.d: equal to drag when the descent is steady, unaccelerated, and without any power changes.
